data.title: Rolls-Royce Cullinan v Bentley Bentayga DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: rolls - royce cullinan v bentley bentayga drag race _ transcript what will win in a oh, that was salty. anyhow, what will win in a track race between a rolls - royce cullin black badge and a bentley bentega? this is one luxury suv drag race i ' ve been wanting to do for years. and here we are. i ' m going to race them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m matt watson and you ' re watching carwo and i ' ve got like road salt in my mouth. the rolls - royce cullinham black badge has a 6. 75 l twin turbo v12, 600 horsepower, 900 new meters of torque, all - wheel drive, and an 8 - speed automatic gearbox. it weighs 2, 660 kg, and new versions cost from around £380, 000. the bentley bentega has a 4 l twin turbo v8, 550 horsepower, 770 new m of torque, all - wheel drive, and an 8 - speed automatic gearbox. it weighs 2, 416 kg and the latest versions cost from £227, 000. now, ideally, i would have liked to have the w12 version of the bentega to race against this v12 rolls - royce. however, these cars actually closer matched in terms of performance. so, it ' s the right lineup. and still, we ' ve got bentley versus rolls - royce. now, obviously, i like the higher things in life. so, we ' ve got the right person to drive the bentley, someone who ' s more liable to slum than me. yanni, how you doing? i ' m okay. so you know underneath the skin that car there shares a lot of its parts with your lamborghini urus, right? i do know that. all from the vw group. so bedley bentega, porsche cayenne, urus and the audi q8. very, very similar. different tunings. what do you think of the interior of that compared to your urus? i ' m going to be honest with you. i don ' t like bentega or whatsoever. i don ' t like how it looks. i don ' t like the interior. i just don ' t like bentega at all. what do you think of cullinan? do you like cullinan? i prefer a cullen. i think it ' s a lot more luxury, but that rolls - royce bentley
